videoData.video_title: The Debt Stack That Quietly Kills Cash Flow
videoData.topic: business credit and cash flow management

script_sections.text: Bad debt does not look dangerous until it eats your margin.
APR, repayment cadence, and hidden fees can turn an easy line of credit into a drag anchor.
The real cost of debt lives in the monthly pressure on working capital.
Cash flow is a system, not a mood.

affiliate_mentions.reason: Makes weak spots in the numbers obvious before they become emergencies.
affiliate_mentions.disclosure: Affiliate link may be included in the description.
